name: Gingobalo Gingobali
lore:
Lore of Gingobalo Gingobali
                                    


Gingobalo Gingobali is an Italian Brainrot character made by @y0ur_m0m_is_s0_fa7t. The tomato pig version is more popular than the hippopotamus version.
It is a hippo that merges with watermelon or pig that merges with tomato.
The first version displays a hippo watermelon and the second shows a tomato pig. This brainrot is sometimes popularized as an evolution in a popular Italian Brainrot Roblox game (Brainrot Evolution) and was also popularized in Merge Fellas.
Lyrics
Italian
Gingobalo Gingobali Zumbali Zumbalo, se il vento soffia forte Il mare diventa popcorn, ma se soffia plano allora è solo un cuscino bagnato! Ed ecco a voi l'hippopotamo anguria, la dimostrazione vivente che la natura a volte si distrae e lascia che la fantasia prenda il volante.
English
Gingobalo Gingobali Zumbali Zumbalo, if the wind blows strong The sea becomes popcorn, but if it blows softly then it's just a wet pillow! And here is the watermelon hippo, living proof that nature sometimes gets distracted and lets imagination take the wheel.
Chinese
Gingobalo Gingobali Zumbali Zumbalo，如果风刮的很大大海就会变成爆米花，如果风刮的很小那它就只是一个湿枕头。这是西瓜河马，活生生的证明了大自然有时会分心，而让想象力来掌控一切。
